The **Bowls England National Championships (Men's Triples)** is one of the events at the annual Bowls England National Championships.[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Venues

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_triples)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Venues")]

* 1945–1957 ([Paddington Recreation Ground](/wiki/Paddington_Recreation_Ground "Paddington Recreation Ground"))
* 1958–1973 (Watney's Sports Club, [Mortlake](/wiki/Mortlake "Mortlake"))
* 1974–2013 (Worthing Bowls Club, [Beach House Park](/wiki/Beach_House_Park,_Worthing "Beach House Park, Worthing"))
* 2014–present (Victoria Park, Royal Leamington Spa)

## Sponsors

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Bowls_England_National_Championships_(men%27s_triples)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Sponsors")]

* 1982-1987 ([Gateway Building Society](/wiki/The_Woolwich "The Woolwich"))
* 1988-1991 ([The Woolwich](/wiki/The_Woolwich "The Woolwich"))
* 1993-1995 ([Sanatogen](/wiki/Sanatogen "Sanatogen"))
* 2001-2001 ([Yoplait](/wiki/Yoplait "Yoplait"))
* 2003–2005 ([National Express](/wiki/Mobico_Group "Mobico Group"))
* 2006–2006 ([Waitrose](/wiki/Waitrose "Waitrose"))
* 2023–present ([Aviva](/wiki/Aviva "Aviva"))
